title: Potion Guide Vanilla
description: The brewing guide that Mojang should have included.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ce4efeee099ea9d96822eaf747cd17b7f607792.png)

Are you tired of looking at the wiki, everytime you want to make a potion ?
You don't really know what ingredients it takes ?

This mod solve exacly this problem !
It gives you every potion recipes in a simple straightforward way.


## Forget looking at the wiki
Enjoy Potion Guide Vanilla, Brew your potions at peace !


![Demo gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05bcb5475ad7ffb88b52707da329c7ccfb651109.gif)

## Progression mode
- This mod offer a cool progression system
- Show the potions you already unlocked, render hidden potions with a grey item
- Want to render all recipes ?, put UNLOCK_ALL = **true** in the /config/pguidevanilla file of your game.

## Other info
- This mod doesn't render modded potions, only vanilla potions are supported
- Available on Fabric/Neoforge

Thanks to the Minecraft modding community.
